# Pull Request

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? Keep it short and concrete. -->

## Type of Change

<!-- Tick all that apply -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would change existing behaviour)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🛠️ Build / CI / tooling
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor (no behaviour change)

## Related Issues / Context

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123" or "Refs #456" -->

## Test Plan

<!-- How did you validate this change? -->

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test:smoke`
- [ ] `npm run test:regression` (if relevant)
- [ ] Reviewed Playwright/Allure reports locally

## Screenshots / Recordings

<!-- Drop trace, video, or screenshot links here if applicable -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the [Coding Standards](../CONTRIBUTING.md#coding-standards)
- [ ] I used [Conventional Commits](../CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-convention)
- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate
- [ ] I updated relevant documentation (`README`, `docs/`, JSDoc)
- [ ] No hard-coded URLs, credentials, or selectors leaked into specs
- [ ] CI is green
